projects.title: AGM Meeting Tracker
projects.description: Investor-focused platform aggregating AGM/EGM meeting information for Bursa Malaysia shareholders with portfolio-aware filtering and responsive calendar views.
highlights: Automated AGM/EGM data updates
Responsive calendar dashboard views
Bursa Malaysia stock search
Portfolio-based meeting filtering
Google OAuth authentication
Hybrid meeting link integration

Responsive dashboard and progress analytics
